sentences.en: Morning — the cat is on the chair.

sentences.jp: そして、猫は机にいます。
sentences.en: And then — the cat is on the desk.
The cat looks at the book.

sentences.jp: そして、猫は椅子に寝ます。
sentences.en: And then — the cat sleeps on the chair.
On the chair, the cat is there.
The cat and I, the two of us — it is morning.
On the stone is a bird.

sentences.jp: ペンで手紙を書きます。
sentences.en: I write a letter with a pen.
